google.text: Load Confirmation & Rate Agreement Mon Mel LOGISTICS Company: MonMel Logistics 6500 Eastman Rd Marietta, OK 73448-4803 Dispatcher: Melissia MC#: 1191927 This Load Is Assigned To: Load#: 7075 Order Date: 05/15/2025 Amount: $4,450.00 MC#: 1440653 DAVUTRANS INC dba AUTHORITY CARRIERS 39W180 HIGHLAND AVE UNIT 103 Phone #: Fax #: E-Mail: Weight: 402-609-7490 dispatch@monmel.us 42500 ELGIN, IL 60124 Phone: 224-281-7651 Temperature: +26° F Contact: NICK Fax#: Equip: REEFER Ref No: E-Mail: dispatch@authorityc.com Miles: 1505.48 Pickup/Del.# Date Time ORDER# 05/16/25 0001-1400 Stop# Type Company Name, Address, City, State and Zip Code 1 PICK CARGILL, 590 RD 9, SCHUYLER, NE 68661 Phone:402-352-8233 Instructions: PICKUP 613 CASES FOR MONARCH TRADING / TRAILER MUST BE 3/4 FULL OF FUEL / WILL REIMBURSE $50 SHAG/WASH FEE (AT THE SHIPPER) WITH VALID RECIEPT/DROP TRAILER FOR LOADING WILL TAKE SEVERAL HOURS TO GET LOADED RATE INCLUDES WAIT TIME AT THE PLANT / ONCE LOADED YOU MUST PADLOCK TRAILER & KEEP SECURED IN TRANSIT / BLIND SHIPMENT ONCE LOADED WE WILL SEND YOU NEW BOLS FOR DELIVERY Qty Description - 613 FRESH BEEF RUN AT +26 DEGREES Shag/Wash 1 2 DROP B & B TRADING, 1033 TURNPIKE STREET, STOUGHTON, MA 02072 Phone:617-442-1400 16565979 LOAD# 18031 Weight 42500 Rate Total $50.00 $50.00 DEL 05/19/25 5AM** PO# Instructions: DO NOT PAY LUMPER CALL IF REQUESTED / ANY OVER SHORT OR DAMAGED NEED REPORTED BEFORE LEAVING RECEIVER-PHONE CALL REQUIRED / BLIND SHIPMENT PLEASE DELIVER TO ADDRESSES ON RATE CONFIRMATION TBD Flat Rate: $4,400.00 + Flat Miles Charge: $0.00 + Accessorials: $50.00 Payment(s): $0.00 TOTAL AMOUNT: $4,450.00 - Carrier Notes **POSSIBLE BLIND SHIPMENT** Dispatch Terms & Instructions: ***WE NOW REQUIRE TRACKING ON ALL LOADS THROUGH TEXTLOCATE OR DAT TRACKING, FAILURE TO ACCEPT TRACKING WILL RESULT IN A FINE OF $100 PER DAY - YOU CAN ALSO SEND A SAMSARA LINK IN LIEU OF US SENDING TRACKING TO THE DRIVER*** Please send a picture of the BOL once driver is loaded but, before the driver leaves the shipper - failure to do so will result in a $100 fine. All accessorial charges must be pre-approved and billed with receipt & POD. Failure to report lumper fees & other accessorial charges at the time they occur will cause them to NOT be reimbursed. All Problems/Reschedules MUST be handled through our office. Failure to accept tracking, and late pickups or deliveries could result in a fine. You must call (402) 609-7490 if you have any delays at the shipper or receiver. Failure to do so will result in no detention being paid under any circumstances. We answer our phone 24/7. If we don't answer, please leave a message and you will be called back as soon as we are done handling the previous caller. ~ FOR AFTER HOURS SUPPORT PLEASE CALL 402-609-7490 ~ ***ANY OVER SHORT OR DAMAGED BOXES NEED TO BE REPORTED BEFORE LEAVING THE RECEIVER VIA A PHONE CALL - EMAIL IS NOT SUFFICIENT - PLEASE MAKE SURE YOU CALL BEFORE LEAVING THE RECEIVER & MAKE CONTACT WITH US*** If you are booked on a blind shipment & you fail to use the new bol there will be a $500 fine per occurrence. You must print 2 copies of the new paperwork & send them to your driver. Please send Proof of Delivery and any receipts to our email dispatch@monmel.us before your driver leaves the receiver, after 05/15/2025 Load# 7075 Dispatcher: Melissia Page 1 of 2 MonMel Logistics
